name: Lemon-Thyme Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, blend the first five ingredients until almost smooth.
2. With the machine running, gradually add the oil in 1/4-cup increments and process until smooth.
3. If the pesto is dry, mix additional oil by spoonfuls.
4. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
(For storage: Cover surface of pesto with plastic wrap pressed down. Refrigerate up to 2 days or freeze up to 1 week. Bring to room temperature before using.)
